achievements.title: Nice to Yo-Meet You!
achievements.description: Open Pandora's Box
achievements.notes: Obtained when Ark touches the light source in the Elder's basement, opening Pandora's Box for the first time and meeting Yomi

achievements.title: The Doors of Fate
achievements.description: Open Tower 1
achievements.notes: Triggered when approaching Tower 1 for the first time and the Guardian Face opens the door after you state your purpose

achievements.title: Empowered by Experience
achievements.description: Gain a level
achievements.notes: Can be earned starting from the first combat encounters in Tower 1; earliest opportunity after defeating a few Huballs near the entrance

communityTips.text: none of my achievements are showing up on the emulator....

achievements.title: Sorcerer's Stone
achievements.description: Collect a Magirock
achievements.notes: First Magirock is on Tower 1's second floor, east side; can be collected anytime during Chapter 1 from Towers 1-4

communityTips.text:
BRs: Sigam esse guia! Não tem erro!
http://rpga8.free.fr/especial/terranigma/magirocks-01.htm

achievements.title: Eurasia's Rebirth
achievements.description: Complete Tower 1 and resurrect Eurasia
achievements.notes: After defeating the Red Huball mini-boss in Tower 1, the Guardian allows you into the control room where Eurasia is resurrected with the Greek Temple landmark

achievements.title: South America's Rebirth
achievements.description: Complete Tower 2 and resurrect South America
achievements.notes: After completing Tower 2 by pressing the switches and ascending to the fifth floor, the Guardian allows you into the control room to resurrect South America with the Inca Statue landmark

achievements.title: Africa's Rebirth
achievements.description: Complete Tower 3 and resurrect Africa
achievements.notes: After defeating the High Cadet mini-boss in Tower 3, the Guardian commends you and Africa is resurrected with the Pyramid landmark

achievements.title: North America's Rebirth
achievements.description: Complete Tower 4 and resurrect North America
achievements.notes: After defeating the Dancing Huball Troupe in Tower 4, the Guardian allows entry to the control room where North America is resurrected with the Totem Pole landmark

achievements.title: Maiden's Mantle
achievements.description: Receive Elle's Cape in Crysta
achievements.notes: After completing Tower 4, return to Crysta and give Elle the Crystal Thread; sleep, wake at night, talk to Elle again, then sleep again to receive the ElleCape

achievements.title: Suiting Up
achievements.description: Equip a weapon and a piece of armor
achievements.notes: After opening Pandora's Box for the first time, Yomi guides you through equipping the CrySpear (weapon) and Clothes (armor) inside the Pandora's Box menu

achievements.title: Australia's Rebirth
achievements.description: Complete Tower 5 and resurrect Australia
achievements.notes: After defeating the Shadowkeeper boss in Tower 5 (using Elle's Cape to ward off the guardian orb), Australia is resurrected with Airs Rock as the landmark

achievements.title: Polynesia's Rebirth
achievements.description: Complete and resurrect Polynese
achievements.missableCutoff: Must be completed before ascending to the surface in section 7.1.4 — you cannot return to the Underworld afterward
achievements.notes: Complete the Polynesia dungeon south of Tower 4 by destroying the two Living Statues and 7 Red Whisps to reach the control room

achievements.title: Mu's Rebirth
achievements.description: Complete and resurrect Mu
achievements.missableCutoff: Must be completed before ascending to the surface in section 7.1.4 — you cannot return to the Underworld afterward
achievements.notes: Complete the Abyss of Mu dungeon far north of Tower 3 by pushing boulders to reach the control room

achievements.title: Jewelry Journeyman - Chapter 1
achievements.description: Collect every Magirock in Chapter 1
achievements.missableCutoff: All 11 Chapter 1 Magirocks must be collected before ascending to the surface in section 7.1.4 — they are permanently missable afterward
achievements.notes: Collect all 11 Magirocks from Towers 1-4 (numbered 1-11 in the Magirock locations list) before ascending to the surface. Tower 1 has 3, Tower 2 has 3, Tower 3 has 2, Tower 4 has 3. All must be gathered during section 7.1.2 before the point of no return in 7.1.4

achievements.title: Journey to the Surface of the Earth
achievements.description: Complete Chapter 1: The Outset
achievements.notes: Triggered when Ark chooses to depart from the Underworld by falling into the pit east of Crysta, after saying goodbye to Elle and receiving final advice from the Elder

achievements.title: Like a Flippant Zora
achievements.description: Obtain the Green Leaves in the Great Ra Tree and learn how to swim
achievements.notes: Green Leaves (Big Leaves) from Great Ra Tree cavern B5F, unlocks swimming

achievements.title: The Greenest Thumb
achievements.description: Complete the Great Ra Tree Cavern and resurrect all of the plants
achievements.notes: Complete Ra Tree cavern, defeat Parasite boss, resurrect all plants

achievements.title: Getting to the Point
achievements.description: Obtain the Sharp Claws in Grecliff and learn how to climb walls
achievements.notes: Sharp Claws from Perinton nest in Grecliff, unlocks wall climbing

achievements.title: Avian Savior
achievements.description: Complete Grecliff and resurrect all of the birds
achievements.notes: Complete Grecliff, defeat Dark Twins boss, resurrect all birds

achievements.title: No Gusts, No Glory
achievements.description: Resurrect the wind in Windvale
achievements.notes: Resurrect the wind in Windvale by throwing rocks into sparkling pit

achievements.title: All Creatures, Great and Small
achievements.description: Complete Zue and resurrect all of the animals
achievements.notes: Complete Zue dungeon, defeat Storm Master boss, resurrect all animals

achievements.title: I Just Can't Wait to Be King
achievements.description: Complete the test of courage in the Canyon
achievements.notes: Guide Leim through Canyon test of courage, defeat Mud Doll boss

achievements.title: Letting This One Land-Slide
achievements.description: Survive the avalanche in Eklemata
achievements.notes: Trigger avalanche in Eklamata cavern; meet mountain goat

achievements.title: Jewelry Journeyman - Chapter 2
achievements.description: Collect every Magirock in Chapter 2
achievements.missableCutoff: After morph boss in Eklamata (end of 7.2.5), areas from Chapter 2 become inaccessible
achievements.notes: Collect all Chapter 2 Magirocks (rocks #12-#32)

achievements.title: Human Error
achievements.description: Complete Chapter 2: Resurrection of the World
achievements.notes: Defeat Dark Morph boss in Eklamata, complete Chapter 2

achievements.title: Goatal Recall
achievements.description: Go back for the mountain goat in Eklemata in Chapter 3
achievements.missableCutoff: After humans are revived at the end of Chapter 2 (start of 7.3), Eklamata is no longer accessible
achievements.notes: After the avalanche in Eklamata, the mountain goat helps Ark escape the ice cavern; return to check on her after the boss — she will be found dead next to her husband

communityTips.text: Wait...go back to the goat?  The Donner Party goat lived?
How you do that ? Return to the Ice mountain after beat the boss
After defeat the Tibet's boss, you will wake up in Lhasa. Just return to the place where the goat was. *sob*

achievements.title: A Rock for a Rock
achievements.description: Win a Magirock from the minigame in Safarium
achievements.notes: Safarium (Lion's Den) head-counting minigame rewards a Magirock — described in 7.3.1

achievements.title: The Minds Behind Quintet
achievements.description: Visit the developers of Terranigma in Neotokio
achievements.missableCutoff: Neotokio is destroyed by Asmodeus after Dr. Beruga's Lab (7.3.10)
achievements.notes: Visit the Quintet developers in Neotokio after beating the Miserly Ghost — in the optional Neotokio subsection of 7.3.1

achievements.title: A Slob's Remorse
achievements.description: Defeat the Miserly Ghost in Neotokio
achievements.missableCutoff: Neotokio is destroyed by Asmodeus after Dr. Beruga's Lab (7.3.10)
achievements.notes: Defeat the Miserly Ghost boss in the Neotokio sewers — described in the optional Neotokio subsection of 7.3.1

achievements.title: Udon Adonis
achievements.description: Earn the title of "Noodle King" in Neotokio
achievements.missableCutoff: Neotokio is destroyed by Asmodeus after Dr. Beruga's Lab (7.3.10)
achievements.notes: Win the Noodle King eating contest in Neotokio's lower level — described in the Neotokio subsection of 7.3.1

achievements.title: Bury Me with My Money
achievements.description: Obtain Temjin's treasure in the Louran Ruins
achievements.missableCutoff: Must speak to Temjin in the Louran mirage before the zombie transformation — after leaving Louran via Teklama Desert to Europe (7.3.2) the area is no longer accessible
achievements.notes: Talk to Temjin in the Louran mirage (tell him to take money to his grave), then loot his grave in the zombie cemetery — all in 7.3.1

communityTips.text: Damn I miss this one where I can find ?

After defeat the Tibet's boss, you will wake up in Lhasa. Then you need to go to Loran to find MeiLin, in this village you will meet a guy name Temjin, he will ask what to do with his money, tell him that he should take it with him to his grave.
Later you discover that the village is a mirage and the night turns into a zombie village haha. Exploring it you will arrive at the cemetery, just check his grave on top left.

achievements.title: Goodbye to Grief
achievements.description: Save Meilin in the Louran Ruins
achievements.notes: Save Meilin from the Maduu in the Louran zombie ruins using the Red Scarf to guide Turbo — main quest of 7.3.1

achievements.title: Déjà Vu
achievements.description: Meet a familiar face in Loire Castle
achievements.notes: Meet Elle's look-alike (the mute princess) in Loire Castle during the groom contest — described in the Loire Castle subsection of 7.3.2

achievements.title: Flowers for M'Lady
achievements.description: Buy a Pretty Flower in Loire
achievements.notes: Buy a Pretty Flower from the Flower Girl in Loire (1) — described in the Loire (1) subsection of 7.3.2

achievements.title: Snooze Button
achievements.description: Obtain the Protect Bell in Loire
achievements.notes: Obtain the Protect Bell from the tower in Loire Castle after drugging the stew — described in the Loire Castle subsection of 7.3.2

achievements.title: The Wolf Whisperer
achievements.description: Obtain the Dog Whistle and scare off the wolves in Norfest Forest
achievements.notes: Obtain the Dog Whistle in Norfest Forest and use it to scare the wolves at Storkholm — described in the Norfest Forest subsection of 7.3.2

achievements.title: Presque Vu
achievements.description: Visit a familiar place in Norfest Forest
achievements.notes: Visit Storkholm which resembles Crysta from the Underworld — described at the end of the Norfest Forest subsection of 7.3.2

achievements.title: Find Your Voice
achievements.description: Complete Norfest Forest and cure the Princess
achievements.notes: Complete Norfest Forest, retrieve the Portrait from Storkholm, and have Meilin create a mirage to cure the princess — culmination of 7.3.2

achievements.title: Long Live the King
achievements.description: Expand the town of Loire
achievements.missableCutoff: Must vote for Jean in the 7.3.3 election or Loire never expands; voting for Louis permanently locks this
achievements.notes: First expansion of Loire — vote for Jean after the king dies to raise the Growth Index by 20% (described in 7.3.3, summarized in 10.1)

achievements.title: Photo Finish
achievements.description: Help invent the camera in Loire
achievements.notes: Help Pierre the Tinkerer invent the camera in Loire (2) by letting him test it three times — described in 7.3.3

communityTips.text: After expanded Loire go to Pierre's house (is on the first part of the town) and talk to him, he'll request your help to create a new invention. Talk to him a first time and the attempt will fail, get out of his house and enter again.
Talk to him a second time and the attempt of creating the camera will fail again, get out of his house and enter again. Finally, on the third attempt he'll succeed and give a camera to you.

achievements.title: A Meal Fit for a King
achievements.description: Win the food-eating contest in Loire Castle
achievements.notes: Win the food-eating contest in Loire Castle reopened after the king dies — eat the hidden breads worth 3 points each for a total over 20 — described in 7.3.3

achievements.title: The Exorcist
achievements.description: Banish Bloody Mary in Sylvain Castle
achievements.notes: Banish Bloody Mary in Sylvain Castle after solving the jewel puzzle — main boss of 7.3.4

achievements.title: From the New World
achievements.description: Depart from the Litz harbor and return to North America
achievements.notes: Depart from Litz harbor on the boat to the new continent after rescuing Columbus — described at the start of 7.3.5

achievements.title: Rum Runner
achievements.description: Help invent wine in Loire and distribute it in Freedom
achievements.notes: Get wine from the Winery boss in Loire (2) (7.3.3), then give it to the woman at Freedom's pub (7.3.5) — completion in Freedom

achievements.title: Sheer Heart Attack
achievements.description: Spread fashion throughout the world in Freedom
achievements.notes: Give the Fancy Clothes (from Marily in Loire 7.3.3) to the three girls in Freedom — described in Freedom (1) subsection of 7.3.5

achievements.title: Long-Distance Relationship
achievements.description: Motivate Bell to work on his invention in Freedom
achievements.notes: Tell Bell the truth about Amanda, then follow him to the pub and talk to him to motivate his invention work — described in Bell's subsection of 7.3.5

communityTips.text: You must tell the truth to Bell or he won't create the telephone and the town won't expand.

After telling Bell the truth, follow him to the Pub. He'll be quiet and not say a word. Leave the pub and re-enter, talk to Bell again in the pub and he'll say he's going to work on his invention again.

achievements.title: Electric Boogaloo
achievements.description: Help Eddy invent electricity in Freedom
achievements.notes: Help Eddy by pushing his machine until it toasts Ark — first step of electricity invention in Freedom (1), 7.3.5

achievements.title: The Land of the Free
achievements.description: Expand the town of Freedom
achievements.notes: Expand Freedom to level 2 by completing Bell/Eddy/Perel quests and showing photos — summarized in 10.1

achievements.title: Animal Rescue
achievements.description: Free the Kingbird from its captors in Freedom
achievements.missableCutoff: Freedom's Black Market closes after the 3rd expansion (post-Dragoon Castle, 7.3.9)
achievements.notes: Pay 5,000 Gems to free the Kingbird from the Black Market in Freedom (2), then visit his nest for a Magirock — described in Freedom (2) subsection of 7.3.5

achievements.title: Hello, Operator
achievements.description: Help Bell invent the telephone in Freedom
achievements.notes: After Bell returns to work, talk to him and examine the telephone in his back room — described in Freedom (2) subsection of 7.3.5

achievements.title: Let There Be Light
achievements.description: Help Eddy invent the light bulb in Freedom
achievements.notes: Help Eddy with the final experiment by pressing buttons on both machines simultaneously — described in Freedom (2) subsection of 7.3.5

achievements.title: I'm Lovin' It
achievements.description: Help Mack invent the hamburger in Nirlake
achievements.notes: Help Mick (Mack) the chef in Nirlake invent the hamburger by choosing Grind it / Wrap w/lattice / Put it in a bun — described in Nirlake (1) subsection of 7.3.5

achievements.title: Centennial Construction
achievements.description: Build a bridge over the Colorado River
achievements.notes: Collect 9 logs from Gumin Forest and give them to the bridge builder at the Colorado River — described in the Colorado River subsection of 7.3.5

achievements.title: A Nutty Proposition
achievements.description: Complete the squirrel's maze
achievements.notes: Complete the Mouse's Sprinting Test (reach the other side in 20 seconds) for a Magirock — described in 7.3.5

achievements.title: Fiend to All Felines
achievements.description: Win the Cream-a-Cat minigame in Liotto
achievements.notes: Win the Cream-a-Cat minigame in Liotto's carnival for a Magirock — described in 7.3.7

achievements.title: Part of Your World
achievements.description: Complete the Mermaid Tower
achievements.notes: Clear the Mermaid Tower of monsters and defeat the Purple Cally — described in 7.3.7

achievements.title: Set Sail for Discovery
achievements.description: Receive and use the boat
achievements.notes: After clearing Mermaid Tower, the harbor captain gives you the boat — described at the end of 7.3.7

achievements.title: The Big Payoff
achievements.description: Obtain the Enbu Pike in Mu
achievements.missableCutoff: Mu must be resurrected in Chapter 1 (7.1.3) before ascending to the surface at the end of Chapter 2
achievements.notes: Obtain the Enbu Pike on Mu island (only accessible if Mu was resurrected in 7.1.3) — described in the Mu subsection of 7.3.8

achievements.title: Over-Cooked
achievements.description: Spend a night in Polynese
achievements.missableCutoff: Polynese only appears if Mu was resurrected in Chapter 1 (7.1.3) before ascending to the surface
achievements.notes: Take a sun bath on Polynese island (only accessible if Mu was resurrected in 7.1.3) — described in the Polynese subsection of 7.3.8

achievements.title: Gotta Go Fast
achievements.description: Obtain the Speed Shoes
achievements.notes: Find the Speed Shoes in a chest in the Hidden Area of Central Indonesia — described in 7.3.8

achievements.title: A Brush with Greatness
achievements.description: Sell Matis's Painting and introduce art to the world
achievements.notes: Get Matis's Painting from his studio in Loire (2), then sell it to Rich in Great Britain (7.3.8) — quest initiated in 7.3.3

achievements.title: Loire-master
achievements.description: Fully expand the town of Loire
achievements.missableCutoff: Must vote for Jean in 7.3.3 and complete all Loire expansion quests before end of Chapter 3
achievements.notes: Fully expand Loire to level 3 by voting for Jean and completing all expansion prerequisites — summarized in 10.1

achievements.title: No Place Like Home
achievements.description: Rent out an apartment in Loire
achievements.missableCutoff: Loire must reach level 3 first (requires voting for Jean in 7.3.3); apartment unavailable after Chapter 3
achievements.notes: Buy an apartment from the Realtor at Loire Realty for 800 Gems after Loire reaches level 3 — described in Loire (3) subsection of 7.3.8

achievements.title: Interior Designer
achievements.description: Buy every piece of furniture for your apartment in Loire
achievements.missableCutoff: Requires Loire level 3 and apartment purchase (15120); furniture unavailable after Chapter 3
achievements.notes: Buy all 5 pieces of furniture (Rug, Bookshelf, Dresser, Bed, Desk) from Michelle's Furniture for 500 Gems total — described in Loire (3) subsection of 7.3.8

achievements.title: Crystal Clear
achievements.description: Help invent stained glass in Litz
achievements.notes: Give the Crystal (bought at the Caravan in West Africa) to the craftsman in Litz to invent stained glass — described in the Litz subsection of 7.3.8

achievements.title: Canned Response
achievements.description: Help invent tinned sardines in Litz
achievements.notes: Give the Tin Sheet (from Will's home in Nirlake) to the fisherman in Litz to make tinned sardines — described in the Litz subsection of 7.3.8

achievements.title: Putting on the Litz
achievements.description: Fully expand the town of Litz
achievements.notes: Fully expand Litz by giving crystal to craftsman, tin sheet to fisherman, and completing other prerequisites — summarized in 10.1

achievements.title: Worldly Palate
achievements.description: Feed the Tasty Meat and the Tinned Sardines to Stoma in Freedom
achievements.notes: Feed the Tasty Meat (from Suncoast) and the Tinned Sardines (from Litz) to Stoma in Freedom — described in the Freedom subsection of 7.3.8

achievements.title: Wish You Were Here
achievements.description: Snap pictures of all 8 major cities
achievements.notes: Take photos of all 8 major cities (Loire, Freedom, Nirlake, Litz, Suncoast, etc.) using the camera from Pierre — collection achievement

achievements.title: Lost at Sea
achievements.description: Receive the Engagement Ring in the Mermaid Tower and return it to Servas in the Great Lake Cavern
achievements.notes: Receive the Engagement Ring from Nana the Mermaid in Mermaid Tower, then return it to Servas at the Great Lake Cavern entrance (7.3.8) — key item obtained in 7.3.7

achievements.title: Instant Gills
achievements.description: Obtain the Air Herb in the Great Lake Cavern and gain the ability to dive underwater
achievements.notes: Obtain the Air Herb from a chest in the Great Lake Cavern, granting the ability to dive underwater — described in the Great Lake Cave subsection of 7.3.8

achievements.title: What a Drogue...
achievements.description: Obtain the Magic Anchor in the Great Lake Cavern and gain the ability to resist water currents
achievements.missableCutoff: Must retrieve before completing the Great Lake Cavern boss (Hitoderon) and rescuing Will
achievements.notes: Obtain the Magic Anchor from a chest behind the waterfall in the Great Lake Cavern — described in 7.3.8

achievements.title: Loch Gnoss Monster
achievements.description: Rescue Gnossie from Hiterodon
achievements.notes: Rescue Gnossie (Gossie) from the Hitoderon boss in the Great Lake Cavern — described at the end of the Great Lake Cave subsection of 7.3.8

achievements.title: Soak Up the Sun
achievements.description: Fully expand the town of Suncoast
achievements.notes: Fully expand Suncoast by showing photos, giving Tasty Meat to Stoma, completing Beruga's Lab, and giving Airfield Plans to the mayor — summarized in 10.1

achievements.title: The Home of the Brave
achievements.description: Fully expand the town of Freedom
achievements.notes: Fully expand Freedom to level 3 by completing Bell's telephone, Eddy's light bulb, showing photos, and completing Dragoon Castle — summarized in 10.1

achievements.title: A Family Reunion
achievements.description: Reunite Chija with her parents in Yunkou
achievements.notes: Find Chija's parents in Yunkou (upper right building) and tell them their daughter is at the Nomad's Camp — described in the Yunkou subsection of 7.3.9

achievements.title: Dream Diver
achievements.description: Learn the truth about what happened at Storkholm in Loire
achievements.notes: Give Ginseng to Fyda in Yunkou and enter her dream to learn the truth about Storkholm — described in the Yunkou subsection of 7.3.9

achievements.title: Full Metal Panic
achievements.description: Complete Dragoon Castle
achievements.notes: Complete Dragoon Castle by sneaking past guards, rescuing Elle, and escaping — described in 7.3.9

achievements.title: The Power of Flight
achievements.description: Help Will invent the airplane in Nirlake
achievements.notes: After completing Dragoon Castle, Will lets Ark use the airplane — described at the end of 7.3.9

achievements.title: Cryogenic Calamity
achievements.description: Resurrect Dr. Beruga in his lab
achievements.notes: Reach Dr. Beruga in his lab, defeat the Security Bot, and witness his resurrection — described in 7.3.10

achievements.title: Jamais Vu
achievements.description: See some unfamiliar faces and obtain a Starstone in Astarica
achievements.notes: Drink from the goblet in the shrine west of South America to enter Astarica dream world, solve the statue puzzle, and obtain the Starstone

achievements.title: Grains & Graverobbing
achievements.description: Obtain a Starstone from the skeleton in the Sahara
achievements.notes: Examine the collapsed skeleton in the hidden Sahara desert area northeast of Africa to obtain the Starstone

achievements.title: Like a Penguin Cyrano de Bergerac
achievements.description: Help love blossom and receive a Starstone in Penguinea
achievements.notes: Give a Pretty Flower to the penguin in front of the rightmost igloo in Penguinea to receive the Starstone

achievements.title: Powerful Perspectives
achievements.description: Speak with a strange man in Airsrock and obtain his Starstone
achievements.notes: Climb Airsrock in Australia using Sharp Claws and speak to the scientist watching for the apocalypse to receive the Starstone

achievements.title: Hakuna Matata
achievements.description: Meet an old friend in a smelly place and obtain a Starstone
achievements.notes: Find the Transceiver in Neotokio's police office, enter the sewer, and meet Leim and the survivor to receive the Starstone (smelly place = sewer)

achievements.title: Jewelry Journeyman - Chapter 3
achievements.description: Collect every Magirock available in Chapter 3
achievements.missableCutoff: Multiple Chapter 3 Magirocks become unavailable at different points (Neotokio #36 after Beruga's Lab, Loire Castle #46-47 after castle closes, etc.)
achievements.notes: Collect every Magirock in Chapter 3 — see section 8.1 for locations of all 53 rocks (#'s 33-85); several are missable at various points

achievements.title: The Doctor Is In
achievements.description: Complete Chapter 3: Resurrection of the Genius
achievements.notes: Complete Chapter 3 by presenting all 5 Starstones at Dryvale and merging with the Hero's soul — culmination of 7.3.11

achievements.title: Ultimate Warrior
achievements.description: Equip the Hero's Armor and a weapon
achievements.notes: HeroPike and HeroArmr from Pandora's Box after Ark's rebirth

achievements.title: I Propose a Roast
achievements.description: "Expand" the town of Nirlake
achievements.notes: Help Mick with Big Mick burger, take photos, complete Beruga's Lab — first Nirlake expansion

achievements.title: Going Postal
achievements.description: Deliver the 9 letters from Nirlake to all the rich people in the world
achievements.notes: Deliver 9 letters from Nirlake to Will, Bell, Eddy, Fisherman, Pierre, Matis, Marily, Winery Boss, Rich

achievements.title: Fire Insurance
achievements.description: Fully expand the town of Nirlake
achievements.notes: Fully expand Nirlake — both expansions complete

achievements.title: Ark, M.D.
achievements.description: Cure a man's fever in Suncoast
achievements.notes: Use Fever Medicine on ill groom in Suncoast inn; get WaterPin and 6 Magirocks

achievements.title: Tourist Trap
achievements.description: Help build an airport in Suncoast
achievements.notes: Get Airfield Plans from Will, give to Suncoast mayor to expand town

achievements.title: Jewelry Journeyman - Chapter 4
achievements.description: Collect every Magirock in Chapter 4
achievements.notes: Collect all Chapter 4 Magirocks (rocks #86-#96)

achievements.title: But Not Unkillable
achievements.description: Defeat Dr. Beruga in his airship
achievements.notes: Defeat Beruga in his airship — caught in his own propeller

communityTips.text: That red gory discretion shot is so satisfying when you know the context.

achievements.title: World Render
achievements.description: Defeat Dark Gaia in the Gaia Stone
achievements.notes: Final boss Dark Gaia in Gaia Stone, two phases (500 HP then 1000 HP)

achievements.title: The Creation of Heaven & Earth
achievements.description: Complete Chapter 4: Resurrection of the Hero and beat the game
achievements.notes: Complete Chapter 4 by beating Dark Gaia -> credits roll

achievements.title: Geology Rocks!
achievements.description: Collect every Magirock in the game
achievements.missableCutoff: Several rocks become unavailable after story events
achievements.notes: Collect all 96 Magirocks across all chapters
